title: Flaky Spanish Cornmeal Crumble
description: A kid-friendly, plant-based dish featuring a flaky cornmeal topping with added depth from bitter herbs like thyme.
instructions: Combine cornmeal and almond milk in a bowl. Add flax seeds and salt, mixing until well combined.
Grate bitter herbs finely and add them to the mixture. Stir in olive oil to help thicken slightly if needed.
Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease an 8x8 inch baking dish with a little bit of oil or cooking spray.
Pour cornmeal mixture into prepared pan and spread evenly. Bake for about 20-25 minutes until golden brown and set in the center.
Allow to cool slightly before serving. Serve warm as a crumble over oatmeal, yogurt, or fresh berries.
